Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 
7 
IMMUNIZATIONS_CD 
LABEL: 
Code Indicating the Level of Immunization Services Offered 
DESCRIPTION: For pharmacies that indicated they offer some level of immunizations (reference variable called 
IMMUNIZATIONS_IND), this variable identifies the level of Immunization services offered. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: IMMUNIZATIONS_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
NCDPD DataQ™ 
VALUES: 
31 =
